candidate.name: Nandanaa M S
candidate.tagline: Robotics & Automation Engineering Student | ROS 2 | Embedded Systems | Computer Vision

career_objective: Dedicated Robotics and Automation student with hands-on experience in robotics, embedded systems, autonomous navigation, computer vision, and mechanical design. Experienced in developing intelligent robotic systems using ROS 2, Nav2 Stack, SLAM Toolbox, OpenCV, LiDAR integration, and Fusion 360 for robotic design and simulation. Passionate about robotics, automation, control systems, and innovative engineering solutions.

bullets: Developed ROS 2-based autonomous robotic systems integrating LiDAR perception, sensor fusion, localization, navigation, and embedded control for real-world field automation.

projects.title: AgroBot – Autonomous Agricultural Weed Detection & Spraying Robot
bullets: Designed the robot chassis and 3-DOF robotic arm in Fusion 360 and developed ROS 2-based navigation, SLAM localization, and OpenCV-powered weed detection for precision agriculture applications.

projects.title: Warehouse AMR Simulation using ROS 2 and Nav2
bullets: Designed and simulated an Autonomous Mobile Robot (AMR) for warehouse logistics, implementing LiDAR-based localization, SLAM mapping, waypoint navigation, path planning, and obstacle avoidance using ROS 2 Jazzy and Nav2 Stack.

projects.title: ROS 2-Based Autonomous Environmental Monitoring Robot
bullets: Developed a physical autonomous mobile robot for environmental monitoring, integrating ROS 2, LiDAR, sensor data acquisition, localization, navigation, and real-time obstacle avoidance for outdoor deployment.

projects.title: Robotic Arm Simulation – Franka Emika Panda with MoveIt 2
bullets: Implemented motion planning, inverse kinematics, trajectory execution, and collision-aware manipulation for the Franka Emika Panda robotic arm using ROS 2 and MoveIt 2.
